name: Robb's Layered Salad with Spicy Peanut Dressing
recipeInstructions:
Dressing:
1. Coconut milk (1 cup)
2. Crunchy peanut butter (1/3 cup)
3. Minced garlic clove (1 lg)
4. Indonesian sweet soy sauce (3 tbsp)
5. Fresh lemon juice (3 tbsp)
6. Lemon zest, square inch (1 ea)
7. Brown sugar (1 tbsp)
8. Crushed hot red pepper (1 tsp)
9. Salt (1/2 tsp)
10. Water (2 tbsp)
11. Thinly sliced scallions (2 ea)
12. Cherry tomatoes (6 ea)
1. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water until tender, 12 to 20 minutes.
2. Drain and peel; slice.
3. Cook cauliflower in boiling salted water until just tender, about 3 minutes.
4. Remove with a slotted spoon and rinse under cold water; drain well.
5. Repeat for carrot, then green beans, and cabbage.
6. Combine coconut milk, peanut butter, garlic, sweet soy sauce, lemon juice, lemon zest, brown sugar, hot pepper, salt, and water in a medium saucepan.
7. Bring to boil over moderate heat, stirring frequently.
8. Reduce heat to moderately low and simmer until thickened, about 10 minutes.
9. Keep warm over very low heat until ready to use.
10. Arrange vegetables in layers in a large salad bowl.
11. Scatter scallions on top.
12. Garnish with tomatoes.
13. Pour the warm peanut butter sauce over all.
14. Serve at room temperature.
